privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified and accurate. The task involves refactoring a hardcoded Docker Compose configuration with specific default values (PostgreSQL 14, Node.js 18-slim, dev_password, port 3000, development mode) to support parameterization using environment variables with defaults. The target production configuration specifies PostgreSQL 15, Node.js 20-slim, secure_prod_pass_2024, port 80, and production mode. All referenced Docker images are official and publicly available on Docker Hub. The application and configuration data are synthetic, created by setup_task.sh for the task environment. Project directory is /home/ga/projects/inventory-system.
